title: GDF progress as Areas of Focus identified
body: "NWS has published Areas of Focus in the search to find a suitable site and a willing community to host a Geological Disposal Facility (GDF). The areas are within the three communities currently involved in the process, in Mid Copeland and South Copeland in Cumbria.   Read the full story on the NWS website: GDF progress as Areas of Focus identified - Nuclear Waste Services  "

taxons.title: Radioactive and nuclear substances and waste
